about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm Abhiram Bhuvanagiri, a Full Stack Developer with a strong passion for building scalable web applications, optimizing performance, and integrating intelligent AI architectures to elevate digital experiences.
about.paragraph2: With a strong foundation in modern frontend frameworks and backend orchestration, I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and constructing robust automation flows that solve real-world problems.

projects.stockAppSubtitle: Next.js stock application using Inngest for background polling and MongoDB, with AI insights and Better Auth.
projects.voiceAppSubtitle: Mock interview simulation utilizing Vapi for real-time interactive voice dialog and Firebase authentication.
projects.botAppSubtitle: Workflow bot built with n8n and LinkedIn APIs using AI-based relevance scoring and Slack alerts.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.p1: This real-time stock market web application provides users with live financial tracking and automated background updates. Designed to render complex stock trends and portfolio performance dynamically, it simplifies tracking assets with rich visuals.
overview.p2: By leveraging a serverless scheduling framework (Inngest) and Next.js, the application fetches and processes financial records asynchronously in the background. This ensures that user dashboards display up-to-the-minute data without requiring constant manual page reloads.
overview.p3: To assist users in making informed decisions, the application incorporates intelligent, AI-driven insights. It highlights emerging patterns, historical anomalies, and trading suggestions based on real-time market data.

coreIdea.title: Core Architecture
coreIdea.p1: The frontend is built with Next.js, featuring optimized server-side rendering and responsive dashboards. In the backend, MongoDB handles persistent storage of user portfolios and historical tickers.
coreIdea.p2: Automated pipelines are managed by Inngest, which schedules background cron jobs to pull stock data periodically. Security is enforced through Better Auth, and custom email notifications are dispatched via Node Mailer.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.p1: This platform simulates realistic technical and behavioral interviews using a responsive voice AI model. It addresses the anxiety and preparation challenges candidates face by providing a private, interactive mock-testing environment.
overview.p2: Utilizing speech recognition technologies and high-fidelity text-to-speech models, the simulated interviewer responds in real-time, asking relevant follow-up questions based on the candidate's answers.
overview.p3: At the end of the simulation, candidates receive detailed, structured feedback on their communication style, answer accuracy, and areas of improvement, allowing them to refine their interview technique.

coreIdea.title: Voice Integration & Real-Time Sync
coreIdea.p1: The core real-time voice handling is powered by Vapi, enabling natural conversation patterns with low-latency audio processing. The UI is built using Next.js and Tailwind CSS for cross-device fluidity.
coreIdea.p2: Firebase handles secure authentication and real-time database syncing, preserving user sessions and evaluation reports.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.p1: This project is an advanced workflow automation bot that simplifies and streamlines the job hunting process. It actively tracks relevant opportunities and reduces manual overhead by auto-matching positions.
overview.p2: By combining external developer APIs and a flexible orchestration engine, the bot fetches job listings daily, parses description keywords, and scores positions based on user profile compatibility.
overview.p3: Once high-scoring jobs are identified, the bot automatically catalogs them and fires real-time notifications directly to the user's communication channels.

coreIdea.title: Orchestration & Integration
coreIdea.p1: The main workflow engine is powered by n8n, orchestrating API requests and webhooks. It communicates directly with LinkedIn APIs to pull current job openings.
coreIdea.p2: Filtered jobs are processed through an AI-based scoring script and cataloged into structured databases for dashboard analysis, sending instantaneous alerts via email and Slack.
